dsl_rule.translation_notes: Momentum indicator mapped to close > sma_40 (40-period lookback confirms uptrend). Relative strength rank mapped to price_pos_20 percentile position >= 0.40 (40th percentile threshold). Exit after 8 months = 240 days. Exit conditions use OR logic (momentum negative OR RS falls below 35th percentile). Signal is context-dependent but optimized for LONG trades in trending regimes per source material on young company indices.

backtest_rule.reason: Momentum indicator mapped to close > sma_40 (40-period lookback confirms uptrend). Relative strength rank mapped to price_pos_20 percentile position >= 0.40 (40th percentile threshold). Exit after 8 months = 240 days. Exit conditions use OR logic (momentum negative OR RS falls below 35th percentile). Signal is context-dependent but optimized for LONG trades in trending regimes per source material on young company indices.

source_rule_text: A trader should use momentum and relative strength indicators to identify and trade persistent trends in stocks and sectors, because these signals have statistically significant predictive power over medium-term horizons.
